recommendations.title: Freaky
recommendations.overview: A mystical, ancient dagger causes a notorious serial killer to magically switch bodies with a 17-year-old girl.

recommendations.title: Happy Death Day 2U

recommendations.title: We Have a Ghost
recommendations.overview: After Kevin finds a ghost named Ernest haunting his new home, he becomes an overnight social media sensation. But when Kevin and Ernest go rogue to investigate the mystery of the latter's past, they become targets of the CIA.

recommendations.title: Scouts Guide to the Zombie Apocalypse

recommendations.title: Drop
recommendations.overview: Violet, a widowed mother on her first date in years, arrives at an upscale restaurant where she is relieved that her date, Henry, is more charming and handsome than she expected. But their chemistry begins to curdle as Violet begins being irritated a

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity: The Marked Ones
recommendations.overview: Seventeen-year-old Jesse has been hearing terrifying sounds coming from his neighbor’s apartment, but when he turns on his camera and sets out to uncover their source, he encounters an ancient evil that won’t rest until it’s claimed his very soul.

recommendations.title: Possession
recommendations.overview: A young woman left her family for an unspecified reason. The husband determines to find out the truth and starts following his wife. At first, he suspects that a man is involved. But gradually, he finds out more and more strange behaviors and bizarre

recommendations.title: The Children
recommendations.overview: A relaxing Christmas vacation turns into a terrifying fight for survival as the children begin to turn on their parents.

recommendations.title: The Autopsy of Jane Doe
recommendations.overview: Father and son coroners receive a mysterious unidentified corpse with no apparent cause of death. As they attempt to examine the "Jane Doe," they discover increasingly bizarre clues that hold the key to her terrifying secrets.

recommendations.title: Dead Man on Campus
recommendations.overview: Two college roommates venture out to identify a fellow student, who is most likely to commit suicide as it will help them pass the semester.
